title: Supply Chain Manager - DSV India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - DSV India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
DSV India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Supply Chain Manager at our Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DSV India:
DSV India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in SAP SCM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DSV India!
